endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks of a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Gets the management lock of a scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a management lock at the subscription level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the management lock of a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks of a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Gets a management lock at the resource group level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a management lock at the resource group level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the management lock of a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks of a resource or any level below resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a management lock at the resource level or any level below resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the management lock of a resource or any level below resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.
